summary: The 'Run prettier' CI job failed because two files in the repository were not formatted with prettier. The `yarn prettier-check` command detected unformatted code and exited with code 1.
root_cause: Two files were not formatted with prettier: `packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js` and `compiler/packages/babel-plugin-react-compiler/src/ReactiveScopes/CodegenReactiveFunction.ts`. The `yarn prettier-check` script detected these files and failed with exit code 1.

evidence.quote:
This project uses prettier to format all JavaScript code.
     Please run yarn prettier-all and add changes to files listed below to your commit:
evidence.reason: The prettier check script explicitly reported that files need formatting and instructed the developer to run `yarn prettier-all`.
This file was listed as needing prettier formatting.
This file was listed as needing prettier formatting.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: The yarn prettier-check command exited with code 1, indicating the formatting check failed.
GitHub Actions confirmed the job step failed with exit code 1.

suggested_fix: Run `yarn prettier-all` locally and commit the formatting changes to the two listed files: `packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js` and `compiler/packages/babel-plugin-react-compiler/src/ReactiveScopes/CodegenReactiveFunction.ts`.
